title: Pressing issues on monday.com for crm/sales or any other department

posts.author: guddu (Abhishek)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello everyone ! i’m new to the monday community and was wondering what are some of the pressing issues monday users are experiencing that i can help with ?

Please let me know or point out to some useful forum link.

P.S: I’ve been actively looking into the forum too in the past few days
